steps.voiced: Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
Click on the desired bomb to select it (82B)
steps.voiced: Select the desired bomb on the SMS page.

steps.action: We will create a weapon delivery program by selecting a preset program. Toggle programs with the OSB next to PROG. We will use PROG 1. STEP is used to change selected station
steps.voiced: Toggle programs with the OSB next to PROG and select a delivery program.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to MODE, then click on OSB to select CCIP Mode
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to MODE and select CCIP.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to MFUZ (Mechanical Fuze), then press on OSB next to NOSE.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to MFUZ, then select NOSE.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to EFUZ (Electronic Fuze), then press on OSB next to DLY1 for a delay if desired, otherwise set to INST.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to EFUZ, then set to INST or DLY1 as desired.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to DRAG, then press on OSB next to either FF (Free-Falling low-drag bomb) or RET (retarded fuze) based on your bomb type.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to DRAG, then select FF or RET based on bomb type.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to « UFC » to activate the UFC keypad for the STORES page
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to UFC to activate the UFC keypad.

steps.action: Click on the OSB next to QTY (« : » means option is selected), type « 2 » on the UFC keypad, then press « ENT » (« : » means option is selected) to set 2 bombs per release.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to QTY, enter desired quantity, then press ENT.

steps.action: Click on the OSB next to MULT (« : » means option is selected), type « 1 » on the UFC keypad, then press « ENT » to set 1 bomb to be released simultaneously from weapon stations
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to MULT, enter desired multiplier, then press ENT.

steps.action: Click on the OSB next to INT (« : » means option is selected), type « 500 » on the UFC keypad, then press « ENT » to set a 500 ft bomb impact spacing.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to INT, enter desired impact spacing in feet, then press ENT.

steps.action: Start a 30-45 degree dive on your target
steps.voiced: Start a 30-45 degree dive on the target.

steps.action: Align target vertically with (Displayed Impact Line), also known as Bomb Fall Line.
steps.voiced: Align the target vertically with the DIL (Bomb Fall Line).

steps.action: The CCIP cross will appear once a bombing solution is computed.
steps.voiced: Confirm CCIP cross appears once a bombing solution is computed.

steps.action: Steer aircraft to keep the DIL vertical and the CCIP cross on the target.
steps.voiced: Steer to keep DIL vertical and CCIP cross on the target.

steps.action: Press and hold the Weapon Release button (« RALT+SPACE ») once CCIP cross is on target.
steps.voiced: Hold Weapon Release Button once CCIP cross is on target.

steps.action: Pull up before velocity vector reaches the PULL UP cue.
steps.voiced: Pull up before velocity vector reaches the PULL UP cue.
